payload.label: pillow
payload.long_description: Rectangular off-white/cream pillow with a woven fabric cover and multiple thin horizontal gray-blue stripes, light fringe at the left end and mild surface wrinkles; mostly visible in the crop and appears approximately 0.6 m from the camera.
